task_completion.description: Locate and select the paper 'Attention Is All You Need' by Vaswani et al. (2017) in the Zotero library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The paper titled 'Attention Is All You Need' with author 'Vaswani' is visible and highlighted/selected in the main Zotero items list.

task_completion.description: Add a child note to the target paper.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A note icon is visible as a child item under 'Attention Is All You Need' in the Zotero list, or the Zotero note editor is open in the right pane with the target paper clearly indicated as its parent.

task_completion.description: Write a meaningful summary of at least 2-3 sentences.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text inside the Zotero note editor contains multiple sentences (at least 2-3) and appears to be at least 100 characters in length.

task_completion.description: Include the required concepts: 'Transformer', 'self-attention', and 'machine translation' (or 'translation').
task_completion.visual_evidence: The words 'Transformer', 'self-attention', and 'translation' (or 'machine translation') are clearly visible within the text of the note in the Zotero editor.

integrity.description: The agent used the Zotero GUI to create the note.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Zotero application window is visible with the note editor active, rather than a terminal window running SQLite commands or a script.

integrity.description: The agent wrote a genuine summary rather than just copy-pasting the prompt instructions.
integrity.visual_evidence: The note contains actual prose summarizing the paper's contributions, rather than just a disjointed list of the required keywords or the exact phrasing from the task description.

integrity.description: The note was created inside Zotero, not a separate text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The note text is being typed into the Zotero right-hand pane or a Zotero standalone note window, not a generic text editor like Notepad, Gedit, or TextEdit.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target paper: 'Attention Is All You Need' by Vaswani (2017). The note must be attached as a child note to this specific paper in Zotero. Required keywords that MUST be present in the note text: 'Transformer', 'self-attention', and 'translation' (or 'machine translation'). The note must be at least 100 characters long (approximately 2-3 sentences).
